description: Score-first TTT (1-epoch SGD) + Causal Backoff N-gram (order=82, alpha_center=1.0, full_c_fix) — 0.29882 BPB (3-seed mean)
methods: TTT (Test-Time Training): 1 epoch SGD, lr=0.005, score-before-update
Causal Backoff N-gram mixer: order=82, 4M hash buckets, entropy-adaptive blending
NGRAM_ALPHA_CENTER=1.0 (aggressive n-gram blending at low entropy positions)
full_c_fix: prevents n-gram predictions when full context has never been seen
GPTQ int6 quantization with damp=0.005, calibrated on validation data
MTP (Multi-Token Prediction) with 2 heads, loss weight 0.1
